## Developer Guide

If you are new to using `nbdev` here are some useful pointers to get you
started.

### Install SumbumsTeaTime in Development mode

``` sh
# make sure SumbumsTeaTime package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to SumbumsTeaTime
$ nbdev_prepare
```

## Usage

### Installation

Install latest from the GitHub \[repository\]\[repo\]:

``` sh
$ pip install git+https://github.com//SumbumsTeaTime.git
```

or from \[conda\]\[conda\]

``` sh
$ conda install -c  SumbumsTeaTime
```

or from \[pypi\]\[pypi\]

``` sh
$ pip install SumbumsTeaTime
```

\[repo\]: \[docs\]: https://.github.io/SumbumsTeaTime/ \[pypi\]:
https://pypi.org/project/SumbumsTeaTime/ \[conda\]:
https://anaconda.org//SumbumsTeaTime

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub
\[repository\]\[repo\]’s \[pages\]\[docs\]. Additionally you can find
package manager specific guidelines on \[conda\]\[conda\] and
\[pypi\]\[pypi\] respectively.

\[repo\]: \[docs\]: https://.github.io/SumbumsTeaTime/ \[pypi\]:
https://pypi.org/project/SumbumsTeaTime/ \[conda\]:
https://anaconda.org//SumbumsTeaTime
